# zabbix_user_group (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the user group.

### Optional

- `debug_mode` (Number) Whether debug mode is enabled or disabled.
- `gui_access` (Number) Frontend authentication method of the users in the group.
- `host_permission` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--host_permission))
- `status` (Number) Whether the user group is enabled or disabled. For deprovisioned users, the user group cannot be enabled.
- `template_permission` (Block List) Template group permissions (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--template_permission))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--host_permission"></a>
### Nested Schema for `host_permission`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `permission` (Number)


<a id="nestedblock--template_permission"></a>
### Nested Schema for `template_permission`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `permission` (Number)
